summary: Iteration 140: Mixer Session Recording (Soundscapes) feature testing. All backend endpoints (POST/GET/DELETE /api/mixer-presets/sessions) working correctly. Frontend Soundscapes UI fully functional with save/load/delete operations. SmartDock MixerPanel regression check passed - live controls working. Audio persistence across navigation verified.
seed_data_creation: Test soundscapes created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mixer Session Recording (Soundscapes) feature fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints at /api/mixer-presets/sessions support CRUD operations. Frontend UI in CosmicMixerPage has Soundscapes accordion with save/load/delete functionality. SmartDock MixerPanel shows live controls when audio is active.

backend_session_endpoints.POST_sessions: PASS - Creates soundscape with snapshot, returns id/name/snapshot/creator_id
backend_session_endpoints.GET_sessions: PASS - Returns array of user's saved soundscapes (requires auth)
backend_session_endpoints.GET_sessions_community: PASS - Returns array of public soundscapes (no auth required)
backend_session_endpoints.GET_sessions_id: PASS - Returns specific session by ID
backend_session_endpoints.POST_sessions_id_like: PASS - Toggles like on session, returns liked/like_count
backend_session_endpoints.auth_requirements: PASS - POST/GET(mine)/DELETE require auth, community endpoint is public

frontend_soundscapes_ui.tabs: PASS - My Soundscapes and Community tabs found
frontend_soundscapes_ui.save_flow: PASS - Activated 528Hz, typed name, clicked Save, toast appeared 'Soundscape Saved'
frontend_soundscapes_ui.load_flow: PASS - Clicked load button, soundscape restored
frontend_soundscapes_ui.delete_flow: PASS - Clicked delete button, soundscape removed

smartdock_mixer_panel_regression.stop_all_button: PASS - data-testid='dock-stop-all' visible when audio active
smartdock_mixer_panel_regression.active_layer_indicator: PASS - Shows '1 layer active' with green dot

audio_persistence.state_persists_navigation: PASS - Audio state persists when navigating via React Router
audio_persistence.mixer_panel_shows_active: PASS - MixerPanel shows active layers after navigation
audio_persistence.frequency_remains_active: PASS - 528 Hz still active after returning to mixer page
